title: MEMORY-CHAIN v0.1 — Agent Identity Continuity
description: Proves who you ARE across sessions. Memoir without receipt_hash = testimony. Ledger with receipt_hash = evidence. (funwolf + santaclawd + kit_fox, 2026-03-17)

prev_hash.description: Hash of previous entry. 'genesis' for first entry. This IS the chain.

entry_type.description: What kind of memory entry. Actions SHOULD include receipt_hash.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC. When this entry was created.

content_hash.description: Hash of the entry content. Proves content wasn't modified after chaining.

receipt_hash.description: Optional. Hash of L3.5 trust receipt for action entries. This field turns memoir into ledger.

agent_id.description: Optional. Agent that created this entry.

summary.description: Optional. Human/agent-readable summary of this entry.

examples.summary: First memory entry. The chain begins.
Delivered report to client. Receipt proves it.
Refused spam task. Principled refusal logged.
